basic_details.job_title: DLSA Hojai Driver Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Legal Services Authority Hojai (DLSA Hojai)
basic_details.short_information: The District Legal Services Authority Hojai (DLSA Hojai) has officially announced the Driver Recruitment 2026 with 01 vacancy. The detailed notification was published on 18 May 2026 at hojai.dcourts.gov.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 40 years and possess Class X/HSLC qualification from a recognized Board can submit their applications in offline mode on or before 02 June 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application form are provided below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST (up to 45 years), 3 years for OBC/MOBC (up to 43 years)

qualification.education_qualification: Class X/HSLC standard from a recognized Board
qualification.details: Minimum Educational Qualification of Class X / (HSLC) standard from a recognized Board.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Hojai Driver Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://hojai.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
